summary: Over 780 guests rate STORIA an average of 4.5 stars. The Neapolitan stone-oven pizza, homemade pasta, and fresh seafood dishes receive particular praise. Many regulars highlight the stylish ambiance with warm lighting and Italian music. Service is consistently described as warm, attentive, and professional – even for larger groups. The central location near Königsplatz makes it a popular meeting point in Munich’s Maxvorstadt district. The house-recipe tiramisù and the wine selection are frequently mentioned as standout highlights.

reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Friendly service and delicious food. I recommend that anyone who can try it should.

(Original)
Kedves kiszolgálás és finom étel. Ajánlom hogy aki teheti próbálja ki.

Die Tagliata vom Thunfisch mit Kartoffeln war richtig köstlich – perfekt zubereitet. Natürlich gab es viel mehr Kartoffeln dazu, als es auf dem Bild zu sehen ist.

(Translated by Google)
The tuna tagliata with potatoes was absolutely delicious – perfectly prepared. Of course, there were many more potatoes than you can see in the picture.

Zu viert dort gewesen zum Pizza essen, jeder war sehr zufrieden.
Überraschend wie gut der Trüffel auf einer der Pizzen war!
Bedienung sehr nett und aufmerksam.
Schummriges dunkles Ambiente, was ich persönlich sehr gerne mag.
Musik im Hintergrund auch sehr passend, italienische Evergreens, schon lange nicht mehr gehört aber sehr sehr stimmig, sehr zu empfehlen

(Translated by Google)
We went there for pizza as a group of four, and everyone was very satisfied.

The truffle on one of the pizzas was surprisingly good! The service was very friendly and attentive. The dim, dark atmosphere is something I personally really like. The background music was also very fitting—Italian evergreens, something I haven't heard in a long time, but it worked perfectly. Highly recommended.
Perfect Silvester🌲🎅, thanks to all kind Storia team🌸

This was a very intimate setting. The restaurant delivers an upperclass vibe with the design, staff uniforms and tunes. We ordered the parmigiana, a pizza and a couple of drinks with the total around $65 aud. The food was very tasty and the staff were very welcoming. I would recommend to someone in Munich looking for an Italian dish with family or on a date.

Sehr gutes Essen, schönes Ambiente, sehr freundliches Personal. Wir waren an 2 Abenden hintereinander dort und wurden am 2. Abend erkannt und persönlich begrüßt. Am ersten Abend hat es etwas länger mit dem Essen gedauert, da 2 größere Gruppen dort waren. Als Entschuldigung gab es für uns einen Prosecco. Das Essen war geschmacklich und optisch ein Genuss. Der Service ließ nichts zu wünschen übrig.  Wir haben uns rundum wohl gefühlt und können das Lokal nur wärmstens weiterempfehlen

(Translated by Google)
Excellent food, lovely atmosphere, and very friendly staff. We dined there two evenings in a row, and on the second evening, we were recognized and personally greeted. The first evening, our meal took a little longer because two larger groups were there. As an apology, we were offered a glass of Prosecco. The food was a delight, both in taste and presentation. The service was impeccable. We felt completely at ease and highly recommend this restaurant.

Tolle Lokal. Gehobener Anspruch. Tolle Bedienung, super Essen, gute Weine

(Translated by Google)
Great restaurant. Upscale. Excellent service, superb food, good wines.
The Pizza and salad was amazing. They split is so we could share. Amazing place for an afternoon lunch.

Sehr Gutes Essen richtig sauber und schön war heute um 14 uhr mit mein cousengo da nächstesmal geh ich da mit meiner frau hin Super Restaurant

(Translated by Google)
Very good food, really clean and nice. I was there today at 2 pm with my cousin. Next time I'll go there with my wife. Great restaurant!
We had a beautiful dinner. Francesco was wonderful and the service was amazing. Excellent food!

(Translated by Google) The atmosphere and service were great.

(Original)
雰囲気もサービスも素晴らしかったです。

Zufällig entdeckt & das beste Thunfischtartar meines Lebens bekommen. Wir kommen gerne wieder

(Translated by Google)
We discovered it by chance and had the best tuna tartar of our lives. We'd love to come back.

✨
We celebrated a birthday here and had only the best impressions! 🎉 Our table was reserved and beautifully decorated, and the birthday person received a surprise dessert, which was a very sweet and touching gesture. The food was delicious, beautifully served, and the staff were polite and helpful in choosing both meals and drinks. The atmosphere was cozy and warm, and the location is very convenient. Thank you for a wonderful evening – we’ll definitely come back! ❤️

(Translated by Google) Excellent service. The food was very good. The place was very pleasant.

(Original)
Excelente atención. La comida muy buena. El lugar muy ameno

Sehr schönes und gemütliches Ambiente. Wir kamen erst kurz vor Küchenschluss an und konnten dennoch gemütlich zu Abend essen. Vielen Dank an das sehr freundliche Personal an dieser Stelle. Macht weiter so 😀.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice and cozy atmosphere. We arrived just before the kitchen closed and were still able to enjoy a leisurely dinner. Many thanks to the very friendly staff. Keep up the good work! 😀
Solid pizza (though not cheap and not really Neopolitan as some reviewers have described) and very friendly service from the handsome waiter!
Very nice Italian restaurant. Food is excellent and it has substantial wine list.

Gestern nach einem Konzert spät eingekehrt. Sehr herzlicher Empfang, Getränke fein, Essen gab es auch noch bis Mitternacht. Die Pizza war grandios, der beste Teig den ich je hatte, endlich mal Basilikum auf der Pizza. Danke für das tolle Erlebnis.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped in late yesterday after a concert. I received a very warm welcome, the drinks were excellent, and they even served food until midnight. The pizza was fantastic – the best dough I've ever had, and finally, basil on my pizza! Thank you for the wonderful experience.

Tolle sizilianische Küche. Pasta perfekt und ein gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis

(Translated by Google)
Great Sicilian cuisine. Perfect pasta and good value for money.

(Translated by Google) We were a group and chose a set menu. We enjoyed what we ate, but the appetizers could have been a bit more varied: everyone only had veal with tuna sauce and eggplant parmigiana...perhaps a selection of appetizers would have been appropriate.
The staff was efficient but a little accommodating. Overall, however, we had a good time. We really enjoyed the desserts.

(Original)
Eravamo un gruppo e abbiamo fatto un menù fisso. Ci è piaciuto quello che abbiamo mangiato ma gli antipasti potevano essere un po’ più vari: c’era per tutti solo vitel tonné e melanzana alla parmigiana..magari era opportuno pensare ad una selezione di antipasti.
Personale efficiente ma un poco accomodante. Nel complesso però siamo stati bene. I dolci ci sono piaciuti molto

(Translated by Google) The pasta, the risotto, the crunchy vegetables...

(Original)
La pasts, el rissoto, las verduras crujientes...

This centrally located restaurant offers a lovely atmosphere with a warm and inviting ambiance. The service was attentive, professional, and made the dining experience enjoyable. While the prices are on the higher side, the quality of the food justified the cost, delivering well-prepared and flavorful dishes. A great choice for a special night out or a refined dining experience
Good place for business lunch or a nice dinner in the evening

Alles wunderbar! Sehr freundliche Service und Atmosphäre und das Essen schmeckt super 😊

(Translated by Google)
Everything was wonderful! Very friendly service and atmosphere, and the food tasted great 😊

(Translated by Google) We had a fantastic New Year's Eve experience.
Functional, welcoming, with attention to detail, excellent food, impeccable service, all at a fair price.
Highly recommended!

(Original)
Esperienza avuta notte di capodanno fantastica.
Funzionale, accogliente ,curato nel dettaglio, cibo eccellente, servizio impeccabile il tutto al prezzo giusto.
Consigliato alla grande!

(Translated by Google) Great atmosphere! The food was very good.
The service wasn't very professional!
A lovely evening.

(Original)
Bella Atmosfera! Il cibo era molto buono.
Servizio non molto professionale!
Bella serata.

Gestern war unsere Gruppe dort, mit wohlgemerkt über 20 Gästen, sie waren von der warmen Atmosphäre, dem tollen Service absolut begeistert. Die Aperitifs wurden liebevoll vorbereitet. Das Team ist sehr zuvorkommend und aufmerksam. Vielen Dank für diese tolle Erfahrung, liebe Storia!

(Translated by Google)
Our group was there yesterday, with over 20 guests. They were absolutely thrilled by the warm atmosphere and the excellent service. The aperitifs were lovingly prepared. The team is very accommodating and attentive. Thank you so much for this wonderful experience, dear Storia!

(Translated by Google) I can say in a few words that it is not only a wonderful place, but above all also a magical place, as is life, because in life you never know when your last meal will be, or your last hug, or even your last kiss with the person you love. And this is why life is magical because you don't know if they are the last things you do or not. And life is beautiful precisely for this reason, because it is magical, and this is why you have to live it as if every day were your last, because you do them with such a desire to live. Because if it is truly your last day that does precisely these things, you make me with more love. And this is why you have to live it, I repeat, as if it were your last, because if it is not truly your last gay day, I repeat, do these things then, you have to live it with great happiness and above all with great sweetness. Because, if it is true that I repeat this for the last time, life is: (MAGICALLY), "BEAUTIFUL."

(Original)
Posso dire in poche parole che è un posto oltre che meraviglioso, ma soprattutto anche un posto magico, come lo è anche la vita, poiché appunto nella vita non sai mai quand'è il tuo ultimo pasto, ovvero il tuo ultimo abbraccio, o anche il tuo ultimo bacio alla persona che ami. E per questo la vita è magica perché non sai se sono le ultime cose che fai oppure no. È la vita è bella proprio per questo motivo perché è magica, è per questo bisogna viverla come se fosse ogni giorno l'ultimo giorno, perché li fai appunto con tanta voglia di vivere. Perché se è veramente l'ultimo giorno che fa appunto queste cose mi fai con più amore. E per questo bisogna viverla ripeto come se fosse l'ultimo perché se non è veramente, l'ultimo giorno gay, ripeto fai queste cose allora, bisogna viverla appunto con molta felicità e soprattutto con molta dolcezza. Perché, se è vero che così ripeto per l'ultima volta la vita è: ( MAGICAMENTE ), " BELLA ".
An elegant atmosphere but the foods were just average

Das Personal ist sehr bemüht, nett und vor allem sehr schnell.
Das Essen war *sensationell* lecker, Nudeln auf den Punkt, Salat frisch und die Pizzen bzw. das Pizzabrot war sehr lecker. Jederzeit gerne wieder

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very attentive, friendly, and above all, very fast.

The food was absolutely delicious—the pasta was cooked perfectly, the salad was fresh, and the pizzas and pizza bread were very tasty. I would gladly come back anytime.

Sensationelle Pizza!!! Tolles Ambiente! Perfektes Service! Großes Lob an den Gastrochef!! Wir kommen wieder

(Translated by Google)
Sensational pizza!!! Great atmosphere! Perfect service! Huge praise to the chef!! We'll be back.

Essen und Serrvice, wunderbar, die Musik scheußlich und vor allen Dingen viel zu laut.

(Translated by Google)
Food and service were wonderful, but the music was awful and, above all, much too loud.

(Translated by Google) Great place for dinner!
Delicious food and excellent service! Special thanks to Anastasia ♥️

(Original)
Отличное место для ужина!
Вкусная еда и отличное обслуживание! Отдельное спасибо Анастасии ♥️

The mortadella and buratta pizza was one of the top 3 pizzas I’ve ever had. Staff were lovely and welcoming and happy to help me in English once I butchered some German speaking. Lovely spot to people watch and let the afternoon pass by.

Super schönes und angenehmes Ambiente mit sehr viel Geschmack zum Detail .Das Essen schmeckt hervorragend (3 verschiedene Pizzen). Service ist supernett. Würde jedem einen Besuch empfehlen.

(Translated by Google)
A super nice and pleasant atmosphere with great attention to detail. The food is excellent (3 different pizzas). The service is super friendly. I would recommend a visit to everyone.

(Translated by Google) Everything is fine, the food is great, but the service is mega slow when the restaurant is empty. Autumn is very slow.

(Original)
Все хорошо, кухня атмосфера, но обслуживание при пустом зале Мега медленное. Осень очень медленное

Exzellenter Service, sehr gutes Essen, relativ kurze Wartezeiten und angenehmes Ambiente. Das Personal ist sehr hilfsbereit und höflich, insgesammt ein super Erlebnis, würd ich empfehlen!

Excellent service, very good food, relatively short waiting times, and a pleasant atmosphere. The staff is very helpful and polite; overall, a great experience – I would recommend it!
Perfect food and enviroment. Abad very good waiter

(Translated by Google) A wonderful Italian restaurant, the atmosphere and the food were amazing.

(Original)
Harika bir italyan restaurantı, ortam ve yemekler müthişti.

I love this place, come here often. They are very laid back, so if you want something and need to be out of there in under two hours, you need to get their attention. If you are not in a time crunch, slow service is perfect if you like who you went there with! The food is always amazing, the cocktails are always on point and refreshing and excellent selection of wine.

Sehr nette, aufmerksame Kellner, leckeres Essen, schönes Ambiente. Die Musik im Hintergrund war unaufgeregt und sehr dezent.

Very friendly and attentive waiters, delicious food, lovely atmosphere. The background music was unobtrusive and very discreet.

Nach einem wundervollen Tag in München, hungrig dieses Restaurant entdeckt.

Ich hatte den „Schwarzen Risotto“.

Es war eine Offenbarung!!!

Lange lange nicht mehr so gut gegessen.

Service war unglaublich professionell und freundlich.

Alleine schon wegen diesem Restaurant kommen wir wieder nach München!!!

(Translated by Google)
After a wonderful day in Munich, I discovered this restaurant while hungry.

I had the "Black Risotto."

It was a revelation!!!

I haven't eaten this well in a long, long time.

The service was incredibly professional and friendly.

We'll come back to Munich just for this restaurant!!!

Storia Restaurant is my saving grace on stressful days. The option to order food contactlessly is super practical. The Italian specialties are a culinary delight. The friendly service rounds off the overall picture perfectly
The Location Storia is my go-to place for Italian food. The pizza is the best I've had in a long way, and the staff is always so friendly and welcoming

Essen war sehr gut, selbst gemachte Pasta und Original Steinofen Pizza.

(Translated by Google) A beautiful and very welcoming place.
The staff is very professional and kind.

Un locale bellissimo e molto accogliente,
Il personale molto professionale e gentile.

(Translated by Google) Great place, excellent food and a family atmosphere, recommended

(Original)
Ottimo locale,cibo eccellente e un ambiente familiare ,consigliato

Genuinely one of the best pizzas I’ve had - we ordered the salami picante. Great service and a cool restaurant! They also squeezed us in even though they could have refused us as we arrived so late, lovely accommodating people!

Came across Storia today. Absolutely recommend. Nice atmosphere. Maybe I was just lucky, but oh my god, the chestnut pasta with broccoli was amazing. My partner also loved his pizza. All in all, a very good experience.

Köstliches Essen, guter Service & nettes Ambiente. Preise angemessen, Portionen machen satt! Gerne wieder!

Delicious food, good service & pleasant atmosphere. Prices are reasonable, and the portions are generous! I'd gladly come again!
